questions.text: The average of first 5 natural numbers is:
The mode is the most frequently occurring value in a data set.
questions.explanation: Mode is the value that appears most often in a data set. A data set can have one mode, multiple modes, or no mode.

questions.text: What is the range of a data set?
questions.correctAnswer: Range is the difference between the highest and lowest values.
questions.explanation: Range = Highest value - Lowest value. It shows the spread of the data.

questions.text: The ________ is the middle value when data is arranged in order.
questions.explanation: Median is the middle value in an ordered data set. If there are even number of values, median is the average of two middle values.
